title: Split archive lifecycle orchestration
outOfScope: Changing Work Item schema or lifecycle behavior
Changing public CLI arguments or generated status format

sources.reason: Core Work Item gate integration tests.

riskAssessment.reason: The entrypoint coordinates locks, persistence, status generation, and preflight; behavior-preserving extraction requires regression evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The change is a behavior-preserving extraction with existing lifecycle tests in scope.

preReviewWarnings: Review error rollback, lock release, and code-mode preflight paths for unchanged behavior.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: ai_start.main is reduced to orchestration while extracted helpers preserve existing behavior.
Lifecycle tests cover review mode, code mode, lock failure, status failure, and rollback behavior.
No CLI argument, Contract field, status output, or lifecycle decision changes.
Project and AI governance checks pass.
guidelines: Refactoring must not change externally visible lifecycle behavior.
Extracted helpers must remain within ai_start.py and introduce no dependencies.

intent.problem: ai_start.main combines input validation, lifecycle policy, Contract construction, Summary construction, persistence, status generation, observability, and preflight execution in one large function.
constraints: Preserve all CLI behavior and generated JSON/status structures.
Do not change lifecycle policy or validation semantics.
Keep the extraction local to scripts/ai_start.py.
intent.rationale: Separating deterministic construction from orchestration lowers future branch coupling without expanding the public surface.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: review-mode start preserves Contract and Summary creation
scenarioCoverage.reason: Covered by existing start lifecycle tests.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: code-mode preflight and status refresh preserve lifecycle behavior
scenarioCoverage.reason: Covered by existing governance journey tests.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: status-generation failure rolls back newly created Work Item files
scenarioCoverage.reason: Covered by the atomicity regression path.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
